if.test: fineStatus != null and fineStatus != '' and fineStatus != 'ALL'

mapper.select:
SELECT v.violation_id AS violationId, v.intersection_id AS intersectionId, i.name AS intersectionName, v.plate_number AS plateNumber, v.violation_type AS violationType, v.image_url AS imageUrl, TO_CHAR(v.detected_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS detectedAt, v.fine_status AS fineStatus, v.is_corrected AS isCorrected FROM violation_log v JOIN intersection i ON v.intersection_id = i.intersection_id
ORDER BY v.violation_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM violation_log v JOIN intersection i ON v.intersection_id = i.intersection_id

SELECT v.violation_id AS violationId, v.intersection_id AS intersectionId, i.name AS intersectionName, v.plate_number AS plateNumber, v.violation_type AS violationType, v.image_url AS imageUrl, TO_CHAR(v.detected_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS detectedAt, v.fine_status AS fineStatus, v.is_corrected AS isCorrected FROM violation_log v JOIN intersection i ON v.intersection_id = i.intersection_id WHERE v.violation_id = #{violationId}
